info.english_meaning: to have rotten smell to have bad smell
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: pUtIBAvaH = dOrganDyam iti sidDAntakOmudI  pavitrIkaraRamiti tattvaboDinI  ' kuTnAti kunTet saMkleSe pUtIBAve tu kuTyati ' (Slo. 38) iti devaH
